plugins.name: Work Origins
plugins.description: Live position display, one-tap axis zeroing, and a full G54–G59 work coordinate system manager with offset table.
plugins.author: figamore

plugins.name: Heightmap
plugins.description: Probe a surface heightmap and apply Z-correction to G-code files for PCB milling, engraving, and other precision work.
plugins.author: figamore

plugins.name: MIDI to G-code
plugins.description: Convert a MIDI file to stepper-motor music G-code using micro-oscillation moves on X/Y/Z axes.
plugins.author: figamore
